description: Chairperson holds 15% shareholding in a shipping agency company that operates at Mombasa Port and pays port dues to KPA
mitigationAction: Chairperson recuses from all decisions relating to shipping agency licensing and port dues

description: Director is a partner at a law firm that has been engaged by Kenya Airways for legal services in the past 3 years
mitigationAction: Director recuses from decisions on legal services procurement; law firm engagement to be reviewed at next board meeting

description: Manager's spouse is a director of an electrical equipment supplier that has submitted bids for KPLC smart meter contracts
mitigationAction: Manager excluded from smart meter procurement evaluation committee; matter referred to Ethics and Anti-Corruption Committee

description: Director serves as a consultant to an international energy company that is bidding for geothermal development rights in Kenya
mitigationAction: Director resigned from consulting engagement; conflict resolved

description: Director General's family trust holds shares in a media production company that has submitted a content production proposal to KBC
mitigationAction: Director General recused from content procurement decisions; matter referred to Board Audit Committee
